tldr: Pogačar took a solo win after attacking on the final ascent of the Jaunpass — 14 seconds clear of Lipowitz, who again rode strongly on the climb without matching the closing kilometres. The chase group nearly two minutes back; Castrillo led them in.

narrative.headline: Pogačar's third stage win solo
narrative.body: 149.6 km from Broc to Charmey with the cat-1 Jaunpass as the final ascent. Pogačar attacked late on the climb, took the descent solo, won by 14 seconds. Lipowitz's stage 2 of three top-3 finishes against Pogačar in a week.

gcImpact.headline: Pogačar's margin secure
gcImpact.body: GC tightened around the leader; only Lipowitz close on time.

riderPerformances.name: Tadej Pogačar
riderPerformances.narrative: Third stage win of the week. The Romandie domination sets up perfectly for Liège-Bastogne-Liège in twenty-four days.
